stemHtml: If a crew are trained for LVO (Low Visibility Operations), what might differ during flights in VMC or IMC where no LVO exists?

options.b: SOPs might differ for flights in VMC or IMC where no low visibility operations exist.
options.c: The LVO-trained crew will not be permitted to operate under non-LVO conditions.
options.d: MEL items have no impact on operations outside of LVO.
